title: IIT Kanpur – Senior Research Fellow – 1 Posts
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) invites applications for 1 post of Senior Research Fellow from PhD candidates in Metallurgical Engineering from NITs or IITs with relevant research experience, and the offline application process will run up to 28 May 2026 at iitk.ac.in.
